title: Remove footer attribution text

requirements.text: Remove the text content corresponding to XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/footer[1]/div[1]/div[1]/p[2] by deleting the second paragraph in the footer (the 'Built with … using caffeine.ai' attribution line) from the FooterSection component.
acceptanceCriteria:
The footer no longer renders the second

element that contains the 'Built with … using caffeine.ai' attribution.
The footer still renders the social icon buttons and the copyright line unchanged.
No empty spacing or layout artifacts remain after removing the paragraph (overall footer spacing remains visually balanced).

constraints: Apply changes ONLY to the selected element identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/footer[1]/div[1]/div[1]/p[2].
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui or any other immutable paths specified in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
nonGoals: Removing or changing any other text outside the selected footer paragraph.
Changing the footer social links, icons, or copyright content.
Adding GitHub Pages deployment tooling or documentation (not requested in this specific prompt).
